name: PDF Thumbnails
description: Automatically generates cover thumbnails for PDF files in your Jellyfin library by rendering the first page of each PDF. Supports configurable render resolution (DPI) and thumbnail padding mode.
overview: Generates thumbnail images from the first page of PDF files.

versions.changelog:
Initial release
- PDF first-page thumbnail generation
- Configurable render resolution (DPI)
- Configurable thumbnail padding mode (white, transparent, no padding)
